author: y4rr
content:
Landed.

## What landed in \`ferrotorch-tokenize/src/lib.rs\`

### Public API
- \`ChatMessage { role, content, extra }\` — \`extra\` is a flattened \`BTreeMap<String, serde_json::Value>\` so templates can reference any non-standard fields (\`name\`, \`tool_calls\`, \`tool_call_id\`, etc.). Implements \`serde::Serialize\` so it can be passed straight to minijinja.
- \`apply_chat_template(template, messages, add_generation_prompt, bos_token, eos_token)\` — renders the Jinja2 template to a string. Same semantics as Python's \`tokenizer.apply_chat_template\`.
- \`apply_chat_template_to_ids(...)\` — convenience wrapper that calls \`apply_chat_template\` then \`encode\` and returns \`(prompt, ids)\`.
- \`load_chat_template(tokenizer_config_path)\` — extracts the \`chat_template\` field from a HF \`tokenizer_config.json\`. Handles both the plain-string form and the multi-template array form (\`[{name, template}, ...]\`).

### minijinja config
Two custom helpers added to the environment:
- \`raise_exception(msg)\` — referenced by Mistral / many tool-use templates; surfaces the message as a \`FerrotorchError::InvalidArgument\`.
- \`strftime_now(fmt)\` — Llama 3.1 system prompt references this for the current date; returns the empty string. Callers wanting real timestamps can preprocess the template.

### Tokenizer flow
The HF chat template typically embeds BOS / role headers literally (\`<|begin_of_text|>\`, \`<|start_header_id|>\` etc.), so the recommended call pattern is:
\`\`\`rust
let template = load_chat_template(\".../tokenizer_config.json\")?.expect(\"no chat_template\");
let bos = tokenizer.id_to_token(128_000);  // \"<|begin_of_text|>\" for Llama 3
let (prompt, ids) = apply_chat_template_to_ids(
    &tokenizer, &template, &messages,
    /* add_generation_prompt */ true,
    bos.as_deref(), None,
    /* add_special_tokens */ false,  // template handles BOS itself
)?;
\`\`\`

## Tests (10 new in \`tokenize::tests\`)
- Two-turn render shape (role headers + EOT + optional generation prompt)
- Trim filter on content
- bos_token / eos_token passthrough
- Extra-field flattening (\`tool_calls\`, \`name\`)
- Invalid-template error path
- \`raise_exception\` propagation
- \`load_chat_template\`: string form, array form, missing field

13 tokenize tests pass total. \`cargo test --workspace --no-fail-fast --features cuda\`: zero regressions.

## Deps
\`ferrotorch-tokenize/Cargo.toml\` adds \`minijinja = "2"\`, plus \`serde\` / \`serde_json\` (already in the workspace) for \`ChatMessage\` (de)serialization and \`tokenizer_config.json\` parsing.
